title: The 4D Framework of AI Fluency
summary: A breakdown of Anthropic's 4D Framework — Delegation, Description, Discernment, and Diligence — the four core skills for working effectively with AI.

title: Race Prompting Framework
summary: A guide to the RACE prompting framework — Role, Action, Context, and Execute — designed to reduce ambiguity and improve the quality of AI outputs through structured prompt construction.

title: What is Product Requirement Document (PRD)?
summary: A guide identifying the key areas of a well-written PRD for agentic coding, with a ready-to-use prompt to capture all sections including problem statements, goals, features, navigation flow, UI design, and out-of-scope items.
